节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the administrator of the enterprise devices.
Enum for type of administrator.
The value of administrator used in BYOD device.
Enum for managed event
The event of bundle added.
The event of bundle removed.
The event of app start.
The event of app stop.
The event of system update.
Event indicating that a system account is added.
Event indicating that a system account is switched.
Event indicating that a system account is removed.
Enum for Policy.
flag bolck list.
flag trust list.
Enables the given ability as a administrator of the device. The admin must have the corresponding permission.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@returns { Promise<void> } the promise returned by the enableDeviceAdmin.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200003 - The administrator ability component is invalid.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200004 - Failed to activate the administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 801 - Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.

节点.return_description: the promise returned by the enableDeviceAdmin.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
The administrator ability component is invalid.
Failed to activate the administrator application of the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

节点.功能描述: Disables a current administrator ability. The admin must have the corresponding permission.

@returns { Promise<void> } the promise returned by the disableDeviceAdmin.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200005 - Failed to deactivate the administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 801 - Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.

节点.return_description: the promise returned by the disableDeviceAdmin.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Failed to deactivate the administrator application of the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

节点.功能描述: Disables a current administrator ability. Only apps with the ohos.permission.MANAGE_ENTERPRISE_DEVICE_ADMIN permission, ohos.permission.START_PROVISIONING_MESSAGE, ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_DEACTIVATE_DEVICE_ADMIN or the shell uid can call this method. or ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_DEACTIVATE_DEVICE_ADMIN The admin must have the corresponding permission. default value is the current user ID. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { number } [userId] - userId indicates the user ID or do not pass user ID,
@returns { Promise<void> } the promise returned by the disableAdmin.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200005 - Failed to deactivate the administrator application of the device.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
number } [userId] - userId indicates the user ID or do not pass user ID,

节点.return_description: the promise returned by the disableAdmin.

error_codes.description: Failed to deactivate the administrator application of the device.
Permission verification failed.

节点.功能描述: Administrator delegates access to policies to another application. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
